ideation: This animation sequence depicts a supervillain's menacing pose. It starts with arms crossed, transitioning to a hand-on-hip stance, then to a dramatic arm-raised gesture, and finally returning to a relaxed pose. The left arm remains mostly static for balance, while the right arm performs the dynamic movements. Frame 1: Arms crossed, conveying a sense of confidence and control. Frame 2: Right hand on hip, left arm slightly away. Frame 3: Right arm raised, left arm relaxed. Frame 4: Both arms return to a relaxed position.

frames.beat: villain arms cross, a confident sneer
right hand on hip, left arm relaxes slightly
right arm dramatically raises, left arm hangs low
both arms fall to sides, menace recedes
